name: Gigantic Bee

link.alt: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea pg. 82
link.name: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea pg. 82

sources.name: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea

text: The honeybee is industrious and generally quite gentle. Following an upwelling of mythic power, however, a number of bee colonies found themselves transformed into gigantic specimens, along with the fields where they harvest nectar. These bees act mostly as they did prior to the infusion of mythic power, except they’re far better able to defend themselves and their hives.
